title: Engage ≥1 candidate steward + the expert reviewer
context: Moving the secured beneficiary forward, M1 requires engaging at least one candidate steward and the credentialed expert reviewer. Only open / public-domain / openly-licensed sources (CIViC CC0, Open Targets CC0, Reactome, license-checked PMC open-access subset); COSMIC, OncoKB, DrugBank, any non-open DB and all controlled-access / patient-level data (dbGaP, EGA, biobanks, EHR) are out of scope and refused. No patient data; all therapeutic-target content is research evidence labeled 'not medical advice'. See PLAN.md.
objective: Engage at least one candidate steward and the credentialed expert reviewer, documenting the commitment status.
acceptanceCriteria: ≥1 candidate steward is actively engaged (beyond initial outreach).
The credentialed expert reviewer is engaged for the M1 audit.
Engagement status is documented and dated.
output: An updated partner/reviewer engagement log, committed via PR.
